product_name: Lena 4616 Worxx articulated tipper Volvo A25G, dump truck made of ABS plastic with rubber tyres and steel axles, construction vehicle with articulated steering, toy dumper for children from 3 years, truck yellow, black

bullets: Worxx articulated tipper from Lena with all-terrain wheel suspension, 3 galvanised steel axles and rotating and tilting steering, for maximum fun
Toy vehicle as a detailed model of the Volvo A25G in yellow and black, with 6 wheels and tilting cargo compartment, so every child becomes a proud dumper driver
Products from the Lena Worxx range are made of ABS plastic, have rubber tyres, galvanised axles made of steel and are delivered in a colourful display box
The toy is suitable for boys and girls from 36 months and is TÜV certified according to ID 38607 - safety and tested for harmful substances
Lena Worxx articulated tipper box, box contents: toy vehicle, colours: yellow, black, dimensions: 57.5 x 21.5 x 21.2 cm, weight: 1195 g, item no. : 4616, EAN: 4006942880300, Brand Lena
content.keywords: Truck garbage recycle trash orange recycling toy lena powerful toys for boys kids gigantic mini pack plastic toddlers vehicles construction huge durable bins rubbish lorry realistic-year-old girls
content.description:
Full control - the Lena Worxx articulated tipper in use  Made for real construction site feeling
The Lena Worxx articulated tipper impresses in the terrain - whether gravel, sand or soil. The powerful design and realistic construction make it an eye-catcher on any outdoor construction site.   Stable in play - equipped with galvanised steel axles
Reliability counts on the children's construction site: With its galvanised steel axles, the Lena Worxx articulated tipper also masters rough applications in the garden. Perfect for small construction managers with big ideas.

compliance.choking_hazard: WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD--Small parts. Not intended for children under 3 yrs
